mapper.sql: ModelNo, ECode, ChineseName, EnglishName, TypeId, ClassifyCode1, ClassifyCode2, ClassifyCode3, CompetitivenessID, DesignTypeId, is_Even, is_Security, ROHS, is_deleted, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, min_pack_unit, Remark, OuterBoxPartNo, OuterBoxQuantity, nonstandard_sized_product, manifoldsign, is_eos, min_quantity
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product (ModelNo, ECode, ChineseName, EnglishName, TypeId, ClassifyCode1, ClassifyCode2, ClassifyCode3, CompetitivenessID, DesignTypeId, is_Even, is_Security, ROHS, is_deleted, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user, min_pack_unit, Remark, OuterBoxPartNo, OuterBoxQuantity, nonstandard_sized_product, manifoldsign, is_eos, min_quantity ) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{designtypeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isEven,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isEos,jdbcType=BIT}, #{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into dbo.product
ModelNo,
ECode,
ChineseName,
EnglishName,
TypeId,
ClassifyCode1,
ClassifyCode2,
ClassifyCode3,
CompetitivenessID,
DesignTypeId,
is_Even,

is_deleted,
create_time,
create_user,
update_time,
update_user,
min_pack_unit,
Remark,
OuterBoxPartNo,
OuterBoxQuantity,
nonstandard_sized_product,
manifoldsign,
is_eos,
min_quantity,

mapper.update:
update dbo.product
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ECode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ChineseName = #{record.chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EnglishName = #{record.englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TypeId = #{record.typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode1 = #{record.classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode2 = #{record.classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode3 = #{record.classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CompetitivenessID = #{record.competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR},
DesignTypeId = #{record.designtypeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_Even = #{record.isEven,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_Security = #{record.isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR},
ROHS = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
min_pack_unit = #{record.minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OuterBoxPartNo = #{record.outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OuterBoxQuantity = #{record.outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nonstandard_sized_product = #{record.nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifoldsign = #{record.manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_eos = #{record.isEos,jdbcType=BIT},
min_quantity = #{record.minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update dbo.product set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ECode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ChineseName = #{record.chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EnglishName = #{record.englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TypeId = #{record.typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode1 = #{record.classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode2 = #{record.classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode3 = #{record.classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CompetitivenessID = #{record.competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR}, DesignTypeId = #{record.designtypeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_Even = #{record.isEven,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_Security = #{record.isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR}, ROHS = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, min_pack_unit = #{record.minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, OuterBoxPartNo = #{record.outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OuterBoxQuantity = #{record.outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, nonstandard_sized_product = #{record.nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifoldsign = #{record.manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_eos = #{record.isEos,jdbcType=BIT}, min_quantity = #{record.minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.product
ECode = #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ChineseName = #{chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EnglishName = #{englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TypeId = #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode1 = #{classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode2 = #{classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassifyCode3 = #{classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CompetitivenessID = #{competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR},
DesignTypeId = #{designtypeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_Even = #{isEven,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_Security = #{isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR},
ROHS = #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
min_pack_unit = #{minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OuterBoxPartNo = #{outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OuterBoxQuantity = #{outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
nonstandard_sized_product = #{nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manifoldsign = #{manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_eos = #{isEos,jdbcType=BIT},
min_quantity = #{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.product set ECode = #{ecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ChineseName = #{chinesename,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EnglishName = #{englishname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TypeId = #{typeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode1 = #{classifycode1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode2 = #{classifycode2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ClassifyCode3 = #{classifycode3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CompetitivenessID = #{competitivenessid,jdbcType=CHAR}, DesignTypeId = #{designtypeid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_Even = #{isEven,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_Security = #{isSecurity,jdbcType=CHAR}, ROHS = #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, min_pack_unit = #{minPackUnit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, OuterBoxPartNo = #{outerboxpartno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OuterBoxQuantity = #{outerboxquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, nonstandard_sized_product = #{nonstandardSizedProduct,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manifoldsign = #{manifoldsign,jdbcType=CHAR}, is_eos = #{isEos,jdbcType=BIT}, min_quantity = #{minQuantity,jdbcType=INTEGER} where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
